name: Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
3. Cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, continuing to beat until well combined.
5. In a small bowl, mix red food coloring with cocoa powder; add this mixture to the creamed ingredients and continue beating until thoroughly incorporated.
6. Gradually add salt and flour alternately with buttermilk to the sugar-egg mixture, mixing after each addition.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Gently fold in remaining portions of red food coloring.
9. Add vinegar to baking soda; stir to combine without further beating.
10. Pour batter evenly into prepared cake pans.
11. Bake for 20 - 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
